retry_reason: Put operation always succeeds; no failure path exists.
contract_summary: This function is a 'put' wrapper: it releases one reference to a c4iw_cq object by decrementing its refcount via refcount_dec_and_test. If the refcount reaches zero (the last reference is gone), it signals the cq_rel_comp completion to notify any waiters that the object is ready for destruction. After calling this function, the caller must not use the object any more, as its reference is gone. This function does not transfer ownership; it consumes a reference. There is no return value to check; the caller implicitly knows the reference is released.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to decrement the refcount of a c4iw_cq object and signal completion if it becomes zero; no other logic.
